title: Let's Go with Pancho Villa
writer: Rafael F. Muñoz, Xavier Villaurrutia, Fernando de Fuentes
actors: Antonio R. Frausto, Domingo Soler, Manuel Tamés
plot: The Mexican Revolution is on its way when six brave peasants, known as "Los Leones de San Pablo", decide to join Pancho Villa's army and help end the suffering in their community by assisting in the struggle. After several battles...
